Registry / Terms / intrinsic error

intrinsic error

VIMOutdated — VIM 1993 G 18 #00656 · 57 instances

Authoritative definition

VIM 1993 · concept #5.24view ↗

error of a measuring instrument, determined under reference conditions

Outdated: Cites VIM 1993. Latest: VIM 2012.
  • VIM 1993 · #5.24
    error of a measuring instrument, determined under reference conditions
  • VIM 1993 · #5.27
    ability of a measuring instrument to provide closely similar indications for repeated applications of the same measurand under the same conditions of measurement

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIM 2012. It may have been removed, renamed, or superseded by a different concept.
  2. MEDIUM 42 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. LOW 14 partially diverge.
